Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.
Video.title: "Family Day"

Video.summary: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.
Video.title: "Opening Day"

Video.summary: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.
Video.title: "Into the Yucatán"

Video.summary: On day three of Mark Peterson’s South America Upland Slam adventure, the guys are snowed in while waiting to head to La Pampa, where the weather promised to be much better. After a tense wait for the go-ahead to fly out, they finally touched down in La Pampa and headed straight to the field. There, the grasslands and scattered thickets provide the perfect habitat for Bushed Tinamou, known for their elusive nature and penchant for hiding among dense underbrush. Day four is dedicated to hunting these Tinamou, with Mark eager to track them in their natural habitat. On day five, their focus shifts to Pigeons, where they set up decoys along the edge of a cut cornfield. The anticipation of drawing in flocks makes for an incredible hunt and Mark can’t wait to see what the day will bring.
Video.title: "South American Upland Slam - La Pampa"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken head to South Texas in search of trophy-sized trout. Along the way they make a pitstop to gear up and custom-build a Texas wading rod.
Video.title: "Double or Nothin'"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Texas hits differently — especially when it’s your first time behind the gun. In this week’s HuntStand TURKEY POSSE episode, Will Cooper introduces longtime best friends Aubry Gold and Chance Eckert to the world of spring turkey hunting in the Lone Star State. What starts as a casual hunt quickly turns into full-blown addiction as Rio Grande gobblers fire up, decoys get worked, and the Texas cedars come alive.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Video.summary: Willi and Chris are back in New Mexico, bowhunting elk. Willi made a poor shot on a bull, and after discovering the cause of the poor shot, he hopes to get redemption as their hunting days come to a close.
Video.title: "New Mexico Elk Redemption"

Video.summary: On this episode of American Heroes Outdoors, We travel north to the Rainy River for Sturgeon fishing with Vietnam Veteran/POW Gary Guggenberger, AHO Ambassador Samantha Birrenkott and Co-Host/AHO Board Member Mike Worden. Gary checks off a bucket list item by catching a sturgeon and we learn more about his time as a Vietnam Prisoner of war for over 4 years. We also share Sam Birrenkott’s experience as an AHO Ambassador and the time her and her family have devoted in the woodshop for our nations heros!...Sam also catches the BIGGEST fish EVER on AHO TV!!
Video.title: "Rainy River Sturgeon Fishing"

Video.summary: On this episode and adventure, we travel to Williston North Dakota for the Williston Fire Fighter fishing tournament that helps support their rural volunteer fire department. The conditions were TOUGH on Lake Sakakawea!! We learn about the Volunteer fire department and the sacrifice it takes to be there for the community. We also highlight our next SCHEELS Hometown Hero, Jim Moe! Click PLAY and check out the good things happening in North Dakota!
Video.title: "Fishing With The Williston Fire Fighters"

Video.summary: U.S. Navy veteran John Fleming recounts the life altering effects of his traumatic brain injury which cost him his rank.
Video.title: "John Fleming"

Video.summary: Retired Army Sergeant Andy Hendrickson recounts his deployment during Operation Iraqi Freedom One, at the aptly adopted named base, Mortar-Ritaville.
Video.title: "Andy Hendrickson"

Video.summary: Mike reaches deep into his bag of tricks to call in this gobbler that seems to be preoccupied with hens. Then, he shows you how to condition your glass calls and strikers.
Video.title: "MIKE NINJAS AN ALABAMA TURKEY!"

Video.summary: Mark and Lisa have a big flock of Rio turkeys right off the roost but have to make a bold move in the Oklahoma winds to get in on this big gobbler.
Video.title: "BIG FLOCK RIO's"

Video.summary: Everything comes together for Mike and Jacob in the Alabama turkey woods. After the hunt, Mike talks about the Ninja calling tricks that finally pulled this gobbler into range.
Video.title: "FATHER & SON TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: Not all turkeys read the script and some turkey hunters earn the tag of "unlucky". Then you have the hunts that go just as planned and are over before breakfast.
Video.title: "TALE OF TWO TURKEYS"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins Capt. Ozzie in Captiva, FL where the action is fast and furious and they chase down an inshore slam in this beautiful Florida fishery.
Video.title: "Captiva Slam"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike and Capt. Glenn Taylor fish their home waters and pay tribute to dear friend Capt. Billy Nobles.
Video.title: "Home Waters"

Video.summary: In the Pilot episode of Goin’ Coastal High School sweethearts Josh and Anna Calhoon hit their local waters of Ft. Walton Beach, FL and show off the diversity of the Estuary.
Video.title: "Pilot"

Video.summary: Josh and good friend as well as fellow guide, Josh Nelson hit the beach for some stud Redfish. They also met with Alex Fogg (Coastal resource manager) for a redfish release with the CCA.
Video.title: "Josh Squared"

Video.summary: Josh and Alex Fogg The Coastal Resource Manager of Destin / Ft. Walton beach fish some of the artificial reefs that have been deployed over the past 20 years.
Video.title: “Alex Fogg”

Video.summary: Josh and Anna set out for a last minute fishing trip that runs a little late. They take a quick detour to the parent pick up line to get the kids from school, and head back out on the water to see what’s biting!
Video.title: "Family Time"

Video.summary: CA heads to Jacksonville, FL to fish the deep waters of the St. Johns River with his good friend Eddie Cabbler.
Video.title: "Thump Therapy"

Video.summary: CA Richardson travels to Wrightsville Beach, NC to fish for flounder with renowned guide Jot Owens, breaking down key techniques along the way.
Video.title: "A Passion for Flounder"

Video.summary: CA returns to his old stomping grounds, chasing legend in familiar waters. Giants still roam here and feed on the smallest of offerings.
Video.title: "The Hunt For Gobby Dick"

Video.summary: Captain C.A. heads to Brownsville, Texas, to chase trout and redfish with well-known local guide Captain Ernest Cisneros.
Video.title: "On the Border"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Flamingo, Everglades National Park, in search of silver and gold.
Video.title: "Fiesta in Flamingo"

Video.summary: From Miami to Apalachicola Bay, Florida, Capt. Jonathan Moss revisits some of his favorite moments from this season.
Video.title: "From Bow to Stern"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss and Captain James Hillman are heading out of Highland Park Fish Camp in Deland, Florida, looking for largemouth bass.
Video.title: “Rustic Retreat”

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing the South Carolina low country with Captain Stephen Flook Jr. The weather is cold and windy, but the plan remains the same, FULL SEND!
Video.title: "Full Send"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Georgia, where we stop in Helen, Alpharetta and Atlanta!!
Video.title: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Image.alt: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through South Carolina, where we stop in Clemson, Travelers Rest and Charleston!!
Video.title: "Lowcountry Buzzer Beater! (Redfish on Fly)"

Video.summary: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.
Video.title: "The hunting heritage of South Africa"

Video.summary: It’s the tail end of spring turkey season in Pennsylvania and the Turkey POSSE joins forces with friends from the Bearded Buck. Despite having access to prime turkey ground, it’s a tough hunt with tight-beaked birds that are fading toward their summer pattern. In the end, patience prevails as a group of gobblers quietly strolls into range of a well-tuned Savage Renegauge.
Video.title: "Hunting Quiet Gobblers - Patience Prevails"

Video.summary: Willi and Tom Petry drew the late season muzzleloader tag for Iowa after an invitation from Tom’s friends, Cody and Cassie. Willi had never hunted Iowa for deer and not wanting to wait for 4-5 years for an archery tag, he took advantage of the offer. It can be a great time to shoot a big buck with the deer focusing on food, but the weather needs to be right.
Video.title: "Late Muzzy Whitetails Iowa Style"

Video.summary: Join Gavin as he heads to Virginia to chase gobblers with a long time friend of The Bearded Buck, Ron Kendra.
Video.title: The - "I Waited 12 HOURS for REDEMPTION | Being Patient for Turkeys WORKS"

Image.alt: The - "I Waited 12 HOURS for REDEMPTION | Being Patient for Turkeys WORKS"
The - "I Waited 12 HOURS for REDEMPTION | Being Patient for Turkeys WORKS"
The - "I Waited 12 HOURS for REDEMPTION | Being Patient for Turkeys WORKS"

Video.summary: As an avid bird hunter who grew up sharing his passion with his dad, Mark Peterson has traveled the globe pursuing his favorite game. After completing the North America Upland Slam and the New Zealand Wingshooting Slam both in a single season, he’s setting his sights on the South America Upland Slam.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Patagonia"

Video.summary: Mark is wrapping up his Argentina hunt and heading to Entre Rios to track down the final two birds on his list: the Rock Pigeon and the Eared Dove. This area is home to over 10 million birds, making it a prime hunting ground. With flocks of pigeons and doves filling the skies, Mark is set for a fast-paced, action-packed finish to his hunt—a perfect end to an unforgettable adventure.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Entre Rios"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff wade into the flooded timber of the legendary Coca-Cola Woods, where mallards drop through the treetops in waves. Amidst echoes of calling and wingbeats, they experience one of America’s most iconic duck hunts.
Video.title: "The Coca-Cola Woods"

Video.summary: Kyle Green explores the 10,000 islands off the West Coast of Florida on his Sea-Doo while trying to catch fish after red tide. If the idea of camping off the grid, only eating what you catch, and discovering remains of thousand-year-old civilizations excites you, this is an episode you won't want to miss.
Video.title: "The Mysterious 10,000 Islands"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson set off to hunt the American Alligator in eastern Texas. A species that was placed on the endangered species list in the 1960s, their populations are now thriving. Kyle and Jeff have agreed to help remove some problem gators off private land owned by their friend Troy, but things get rowdy when Kyle loses a bet and has to swim with the very gators he is hunting.
Video.title: "The Texas Gator Hunt"

Video.summary: The Green Way Outdoors team heads to Alaska to target sockeye salmon. The beautiful color of these harvested fillets will blow your mind.
Video.title: "Alaska Sockeye Salmon"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson head to Maryland to bow-fish for an invasive, toothy fish called the snakehead. They learn how this fish, a native of Asia, made its way to the United States. They also learn from the locals, despite its appearance, it is one tasty fish.
Video.title: "The Snakehead Fish"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.
Video.title: "Creek Monsters"

Video.summary: The Southards are heads to Table Rock for the annual family vacation. Receding water poses a challenge but there’s no lack of fish or laughs at the lake!
Video.title: "Table Rock Tradition"

Video.summary: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.
Video.title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"

Image.alt: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"
DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"
DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"

Video.summary: In this episode we explore the wrecks and reefs that make Marathon one of the top dive destinations in the world. We will highlight what being done buy groups to restore our fragile coral reefs.
Video.title: "Marathon"

Video.summary: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.
Video.title: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2

Image.alt: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!
Video.title: "OPENING DAY 'SHRUTTER"

Video.summary: A remarkable success story of a reintroduction of elk to Wisconsin with RMEF funding & volunteers.
Video.title: RMEF - "A Search For Rebirth"

Video.summary: Well-known for producing some of the highest quality firearms for more than a century, the Browning X-Bolt can lift the “average Joe” hunter to the level of dead-eye marksman. To showcase how simple it can be, self-proclaimed “average hunter” Brandon Bates takes a brand new Browning X-Bolt right out of the box and goes to the range to see what this production rifle can do in “custom rifle” scenarios.
Video.title: Rmef - "Out Of The Box"
